hero.title: Piling Works, Road Boring
hero.subtitle: Bored Piles • CFA Technology • Trenchless Utility Installation

about.title: About Us
about.p1: Alua LLP is a company with many years of experience in piling works and trenchless utility installation in Kazakhstan. We perform bored piles using CFA technology, vibropiling, road boring, and other specialized works.
about.p2: Our company is equipped with modern machinery from world-leading manufacturers: Soilmec, Liebherr, Delmag, MAIT and others. This allows us to complete projects of any complexity with high quality and on schedule.
about.p3: We work with the largest developers and contractors in Kazakhstan. Over 140 companies have entrusted us with their projects.

items.text: Bored piles by CFA technology (continuous flight auger)
items.desc: CFA technology allows piles up to 1.5 m diameter and 35 m depth without soil excavation.
Driving of Larssen sheet piles, steel pipes and piles using FINAROS-800 vibratory hammer.
Trenchless utility installation under roads and structures. Ditch Witch (USA) and UNP 100 (Russia) equipment.
Jacking of steel pipes up to 1500 mm diameter for various utilities.
Full cycle from design to handover. Reinforcement cages on SHNELL Cage Making Machine line.
